name: crack-common
title: crack-common
summary: Password guessing program (common files of all variants)
description:
Password guessing program (common files of all variants)
Crack is program designed to quickly locate vulnerabilities
in Unix (or other) password files by scanning the contents
of a password file, looking for users who have misguidedly
chosen a weak login password.
.
This package provides the common files for the crypt() and
MD5 versions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use crack-common because Password guessing program (common files of all variants).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use crack-common as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair crack-common with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `crack-common --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
